svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="state-machine" name="System Operational State Machine"> <mxGraphModel dx="-545" dy="-164" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="System Operational State Machine" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="15" width="500" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="start" value="" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333333;strokeColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="70" width="30" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="init" value="INIT

HAL init
PWM = 0% (safe)
Watchdog start
Load config" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="130" width="150" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_start" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="start" target="init" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_start_l" value="Power on" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_start" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connect" value="CONNECT

USB enumerate
TCP handshake
State sync" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="310" y="130" width="150" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_init_conn" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="init" target="connect" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_init_conn_l" value="Boot complete,
USB enumerated" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_init_conn" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="normal" value="NORMAL

Full operation
Sensor streaming
Actuator control
Health heartbeat" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="130" width="170" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_conn_norm" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="connect" target="normal" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_conn_norm_l" value="TCP established,
state synced" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_conn_norm" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="degraded" value="DEGRADED

Packet loss > 5%
Increased monitoring
Cautious control" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="840" y="130" width="160" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_norm_deg" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="normal" target="degraded" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_norm_deg_l" value="Packet loss > 5%" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_norm_deg" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_deg_norm" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="degraded" target="normal" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="920" y="260" /> <mxPoint x="690" y="260" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_deg_norm_l" value="Link recovered" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_deg_norm" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="failsafe" value="FAILSAFE

All actuators = 0%
Report cause
Wait for recovery" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="340" width="170" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_norm_fail" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="normal" target="failsafe" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_norm_fail_l" value="Comm loss 3s /
Protobuf error /
Watchdog" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="e_norm_fail" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_deg_fail" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="degraded" target="failsafe" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_deg_fail_l" value="Comm lost" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="e_deg_fail" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recovery" value="RECOVERY

USB power cycle
TCP reconnect
State resync" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="310" y="340" width="150" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fail_rec" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="failsafe" target="recovery" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fail_rec_l" value="Linux initiates
USB power cycle" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_fail_rec" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rec_conn" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="recovery" target="connect" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rec_conn_l" value="MCU rebooted,
USB re-enumerated" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" parent="e_rec_conn" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fault" value="FAULT

Permanent error
Human intervention
required" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=3;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="340" width="150" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rec_fault" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="recovery" target="fault" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rec_fault_l" value="3 recovery
failures" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="e_rec_fault" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diag" value="DIAG
(overlay on NORMAL)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6d0de;strokeColor=#996185;fontSize=10;shadow=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="840" y="340" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_norm_diag" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#996185;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="normal" target="diag" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_norm_diag_l" value="Diag client connects" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#996185;" parent="e_norm_diag" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="520" width="580" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" value="Init/Connect" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="527" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" value="Normal" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="527" width="55" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" value="Degraded" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="205" y="527" width="60" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" value="Fail-Safe" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="275" y="527" width="60" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l5" value="Recovery" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="345" y="527" width="60" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l6" value="Fault (terminal)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=8;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="415" y="527" width="90" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l7" value="Diag (overlay)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6d0de;strokeColor=#996185;fontSize=8;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="515" y="527" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
